name: Transarterial Chemoembolization
description: TACE procedure for hepatocellular carcinoma treatment

findings.technique: Transarterial chemoembolization was performed for liver tumor.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Hepatic Artery
sections.content: Hepatic artery [patent / catheter positioned in right/left hepatic artery].

sections.name: Tumor Supply
sections.content: Tumor vascular supply [selectively catheterized / embolic agent delivered].

sections.name: Non-target
sections.content: No non-target embolization. Extrahepatic collaterals not engaged.

impression:
1. Successful TACE performed.
2. Selective delivery to tumor-feeding vessels.
author: RadReport Templates
